titleStmt.title: SII 27.6: original edition by M. D. Sampath, H. K. Narasimhamurthy, Madhav N. Katti and B. R. Gopal
No. 6. (A.R. No. 208 of 1931-32.) MĀGAṆḌLAPALLE (Near Vanamaladinne), PUNGANUR TALUK, CHITTOOR DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab lying in a field to the west of the village.

This record states that the king, who was camping at Veṁduṟaponne in Paṟuvi-nāḍu, conferred upon Basavayya, son of Bīṟāne-gāvuṇḍa of Puli-nāḍu, the tittle of Pallavāditya-Noḷaṁba-gāvuṇḍa along with other royal insignia such as a horse, umbrella, throne etc., and granted him the village Nagekuṁṭe in Puli-nāḍu. The record gives the genealogy of the king as follows: Iṟiva Noḷaṁba (I) Nanni Noḷaṁba Poḷalchōra Vīramahēndra Ēkavākya Iṟiva-Noḷaṁba (II) (The king bore the titles) Ghaṭeyaṅkakāṟa and Pallavāditya

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti samadhigata pañcamahāśabda mahā
pallavānvayaṁ śrīprithuvīvallabhaṁ pallava
kuḷatiḷakanēkavākyaṁ kāṁcīpura paramēśva
ra śrīmadiṟivanōḷaṁba nātanamagaṁ nannino
ḷaṁba nātanamagaṁ poḷal cōradēvaṁ nātana
magaṁ vīramahēṁdra nātana magaṁ Ēkavākya
dēvaṁ Ātanatammaṁ Iṟiva noḷaṁbaṁ gha
ṭeyaṁkakāṟa pallavādityaṁ prithuvī
rājyaṁgeyyuttaṁ paṟuvināḍa veṁduṟa
ponniyoḷiḻdu pulināḍa permmāḍiḻa
māgara bīṟānegāvuṇḍara magaṁ ba
savayyaṁge pallavāditya soḷaṁba gā
vuṇḍaneṁdu pesaraṁ dayegeydu paṭṭaṁ
gaṭṭi Ēṟalkudure koḍe Aḍepadavaṁke kuṁ
caṁtaḷige kīḷpaṭṭal Aḍḍaṇege gaddige rā
jacinnumaṁ koṭṭu pulināḍa nagekuṁṭe
yaṁ pallavāditya noḷaṁbagāvuṇḍaṁ
ge koḍaṁgeyāge koṭṭaṁ caṁdrākkaṁTheā®ṣīē., 1931-32, pt. īī, p. 48.
Digital edition of SII 27.6 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
